scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp eagleeye.html public/eagleeye.html && cp index.html public/index.html && cp privacy-policy.html public/ && cp data-safety.html public/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p public/shared && cp shared/config.js public/shared/config.js; node -e "const fs=require('fs');let c=fs.readFileSync('public/shared/config.js','utf8');c=c.replace(\"'http://localhost:8080'\",\"'"+(process.env.API_BASE_URL||'http://localhost:8080')+"'\");fs.writeFileSync('public/shared/config.js',c);"; exit 0
